metadata.title: Casa Atlante
metadata.description: Beautiful ocean view holiday rental home, situated on the sunny west of the island of La Palma, in the Jedey neighbourhood.

errors.notFoundMessage: The page you requested does not exist.

booking.title: Plan your stay
booking.lead: Check real-time availability, select your dates, and send us a booking request. We'll confirm rates and arrival details.
booking.price1: 90 euros per night for two guests
booking.price2: 20 euros per night for each additional guest (sleeps max. 4)
booking.price3: Prices exclude IGIC (VAT), which is 7% and added to the final price
booking.price4: Check-out time is 10:00 AM; check-in from 15:00 PM or later
booking.name: Name
booking.summarySelect: Select your check-in and check-out dates and the budget will be displayed.
booking.errorSelectDates: Please select check-in and check-out dates on the calendar.
booking.errorMinStay: Minimum stay is 4 nights. Please adjust your dates.
booking.errorName: Please enter your name and surname.
booking.errorSend: Failed to send request. Please try again.
booking.completeAll: Please complete all fields, pick check-in and check-out (min 4 nights), add your message, and accept the GDPR notice.
booking.gdprAgree2: and consent to my data being used to process this booking request.
booking.gdprRequired: Please accept the GDPR notice to proceed.

apiBooking.datesRequired: Check-in and check-out dates are required.
apiBooking.guestRange: Guest count must be between 1 and 4.
apiBooking.minStay: Minimum stay is 4 nights. Please adjust your dates.
apiBooking.emailNotConfigured: Email is not configured. Set SMTP_HOST, SMTP_PORT, SMTP_USER, SMTP_PASS, and provide a sender email.
apiBooking.subjectGuest: Casa Atlante - Copy of your booking request: {start} → {end}
apiBooking.guestIntro: We confirm we have received your request and we will reply as soon as possible.
